summary: Dashboard violates brand palette consistency rules by using generic UI colors instead of the required diner aesthetic. The interface shows neutral grays and standard blue accents rather than the mandated teal/cream/pink palette defined for fjcloud surfaces.

violations.description: Logged-in dashboard uses generic gray/neutral palette instead of the required diner brand palette. Background appears to be standard neutral colors rather than teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea surfaces.
Dashboard uses neutral gray UI defaults instead of diner palette surfaces. Primary canvas should use teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea, not generic gray backgrounds.
Page background is not the required diner teal #9fd8d2 - appears to be using standard neutral gray background instead.
Card surfaces appear to use standard white/gray instead of the required cream surface #fff8ea for cards and headers.

actions: Apply diner palette to dashboard: replace neutral backgrounds with teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea
Update card surfaces to use cream #fff8ea instead of generic white/gray
Replace any standard blue accents with appropriate diner palette colors
Ensure dashboard maintains visual consistency with public marketing surfaces per brand palette rules
